scenario.key_phrase: My parents want me to start immediately

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Hello! Namaskar! Am I speaking with Jyoti? Main Priya bol rahi hun PhysicsWallah ke sales team se. How are you doing today?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Hi Priya! Haan, I'm Jyoti. I'm doing well, thank you. Actually, I had inquired about your JEE courses online.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: That's wonderful Jyoti! Bilkul, I can see your inquiry here. Tell me, which class are you currently in? And JEE Main ya Advanced - kya target hai aapka?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: I'm in Class 12 right now. My target is JEE Advanced actually. I want to get into IIT, so I need proper guidance for that level.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Excellent choice Jyoti! IIT ka sapna bahut achha hai. JEE Advanced ke liye kitna time hai aapke paas? Board exams ke saath-saath preparation chal rahi hai kya?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Actually, I have about 4 months left for JEE Advanced. Boards are also there, so I'm quite tensed about managing both. That's why I need structured coaching.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Haan, bilkul samajh sakti hun. 4 months mein focused preparation ke liye main aapko JEE Lakshya 2027 recommend karungi. It's specifically designed for Advanced level with intensive problem solving. What's your budget range for coaching?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Budget is not a major concern for us. My parents want quality education and they're ready to invest. Actually, my mother is also here with me right now. Can you tell us about this Lakshya course in detail?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Perfect! Namaste aunty ji! JEE Lakshya 2027 is our premium course at ₹35,999. It includes live classes by Alakh Sir's team, advanced problem sets, mock tests, and doubt clearing sessions. EMI option bhi hai - ₹3,499 per month through PW Pay. Kya aur details chahiye?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: That sounds good Priya. I have two questions - first, will the 4-month timeframe be enough with this course? And second, how are the doubt clearing sessions conducted?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Bilkul enough hai Jyoti! Humara crash course methodology 4 months mein complete Advanced syllabus cover karta hai with intensive practice. Doubt sessions are live - aap directly teachers se interact kar sakti hai. Plus recorded sessions bhi available rehte hain 24/7.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Okay, that's reassuring. My parents want me to start immediately actually. They feel I shouldn't waste any more time. When can I begin the classes?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: That's the best decision aunty ji aur Jyoti! Classes kal se hi start kar sakti hain. I'll share the enrollment link right after this call. Payment PW Pay se kar sakte hain - very secure hai. Shall I proceed with the enrollment process?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Yes Priya, please go ahead. My mom is nodding yes too. We're convinced that this is the right step for my IIT preparation.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Wonderful! Main abhi enrollment details share kar rahi hun. Welcome to PW family Jyoti! Aapka IIT ka sapna definitely pura hoga. All the best for your preparation! Koi aur questions ho to call kar sakti hain.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Thank you so much Priya! You've been really helpful. I'm excited to start this journey with PhysicsWallah. Will definitely reach out if I have any doubts.
